testcase.name: test_plate_ocr_non_plate_image_does_not_500
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_voice_ai.py:97: in test_plate_ocr_non_plate_image_does_not_500 assert r.status_code == 200, f"expected 200, got {r.status_code}: {r.text}" E AssertionError: expected 200, got 500: {"detail":"OCR fallito: Failed to generate chat completion: litellm.BadRequestError: OpenAIException - litellm.BadRequestError: AnthropicException - {\"type\":\"error\",\"error\":{\"type\":\"invalid_request_error\",\"message\":\"Could not process image\"},\"request_id\":\"req_011CcinMNRWkomctopADs5rH\"}. Received Model Group=claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929\nAvailable Model Group Fallbacks=None"} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
